lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Stop it! We’re doing this! Let’s do it!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Noo!! Okay!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Umm, do you have any uhh, moves?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I have no moves. Okay, whatcha doin’ there?! Oh y’know what? I’m sorry, this is just too weird.

lines.text: Yeah, let’s just forget it.

lines.text: Okay!

lines.text: Oh yeah.

Or with the other two women, in the morning y’know I was just lying there and I couldn’t wait to just go hang out with my friends, but with you I always y’know with a friend.

lines.text: The first time! No seriously, imagine if Carol hadn’t realized she was a lesbian.

lines.text: Oh yeah! Come on! Yeah right!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What, you guys really think that I’m that shallow?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, I just think Monica was that fat.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, imagine if I never got fired off Days Of Our Lives ! Oh-hey, there’s Carol again!
lines.stage_direction: Closes his eyes to do so.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What if I had had the guts to quit my job? I’d probably be writing for the New Yorker , getting paid to be funny. But my job’s fun too! I mean tomorrow, I-I don’t have to wear a tie.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What if I had taken that job at Merrill Lynch ?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Merrill Lynch ?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, I had a massage client who worked there and-and he said I had a knack for stocks.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well why didn’t you take the job?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Because at that time you see, I thought everything that rhymed was true. So I thought y’know that if I’d work with stocks, I’d have to live in a box, and only eat lox, and have a pet fox.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, do you guys think that if all those things happened, we’d still hang out?

scenes.scene_description: Central Perk, everyone is there as Rachel enters.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh my God! Rachel Green?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Rob Tillman!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No-no. It’s-it’s me, Ross!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, I’m sorry. Ross Tillman.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, no-no, Ross Geller.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh, of course Monica’s brother!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah. Right.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow! How are you?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Good-good, I’m-I’m married.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh! Me too!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Is-isn’t it the best?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, it’s the best! So, umm how’s Monica?
lines.stage_direction: They both exhale contemplating the joys of marriage.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh really, really great! Yeah! A-actually she’s right down the street, umm, do-do you know what? You should stop bye and say hi.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh, I would love too.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah? Oh-oh, she’d be so excited!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh! Okay!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Come on!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh wait, don’t you have to pay for your, Busty Ladies?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, it’s okay. Some-some kid asked me to pick it up for him, but I don’t…

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh yeah? Okay.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay.
lines.stage_direction: putting the magazine back and holding the money for it

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: But! Don’t you have to give him his money back?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh-huh. Hey, here you go buddy. Sorry, no porn for you. Okay, let’s go see Monica!
lines.stage_direction: Steps to a random kid nearby and hands him his money. To Rachel

scenes.scene_description: A newsstand, Ross is buying a magazine and gets in line behind a woman.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So Monica, still going out with Dr. Boring huh?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: He’s not boring! He’s just-he’s just low key.

lines.speaker: Monica's Boyfriend
lines.text: Here we go, one Hazelnut Latte.
lines.stage_direction: returning Hands it to Monica and sits down.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Monica's Boyfriend
lines.text: Yeah. Y’know, the hazelnut actually not a nut, it’s a seed.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wow!!

lines.speaker: Monica's Boyfriend
lines.text: Can anyone else name a well known seed that’s been masquerading as a nut?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh dear God, let me think.
lines.stage_direction: Starts to sarcastically think about it.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh no! What’s the matter?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh I just got another rejection letter. They said my writing was funny, just not " Archie Comic funny."

lines.speaker: Monica's Boyfriend
lines.text: Y’know what honey? I got to get back to the hospital.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Monica's Boyfriend
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Bye.

lines.speaker: Monica's Boyfriend
lines.text: Bye-bye. Oh uh, by the way, the answer is, the Brazil nut.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Was his question what’s more boring than him?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey man, look sorry about that Archie thing. Do uh, do you need me to give you some money?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey, I may have no money, but I still have my pride.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ehh.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Maybe Joey doesn’t have to give you the money, TV stars have assistants right?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That’s an idea! Hey, if I hired an assistant, would-would you take money from her?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No Joey! Chandler could be your assistant! See, he could answer all of your fan mail and stuff!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That’s great! That would be great! Let’s do that!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I could use the money; it could give me time to write.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh right great! Welcome aboard!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right! Now hey, I need to use the bathroom. Since I don’t need any assistance in there, take a break!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right!

scenes.scene_description: Central Perk, Joey, Fat Monica, and her boyfriend are sitting on the couch. Monica’s boyfriend is getting up to get something. For future reference, for the rest of this episode Monica’s fat, I won’t be calling her Fat Monica throughout.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey Phoebe! Guess what?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Joey just hired Chandler to be his assistant!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ohh that’s so sweet! Oh! Hang on! Hang onnnnnn!!! Go!! No! No-no! I said sell when it hits 50! 5-0, it’s a number! It comes after 4-9!! No, it’s okay. It’s okay, you’re allowed one mistake. Just kidding, you are of course fired.
lines.stage_direction: Her cell phone rings. Quickly grabs a cigarette and starts to light it as her phone rings. Gets the cigarette lighted and answers the phone. On phone.

scenes.scene_description: As Joey goes to the bathroom, Corporate Phoebe enters. She’s wearing a business suit and carrying a briefcase.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey Mon!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Mon, look who I ran into!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God! Rachel!! You look terrific!
lines.stage_direction: gets up and gasps Rachel is stunned to see that her long lost friend is still fat. Monica goes over and gives Rachel a big bear hug, which is quite easy for her.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh, so do you! Did you lose weight?
lines.stage_direction: She’s not quite sure of that one.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You are so sweet to notice! Yes, I lost three and a half pounds!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And, and uh, you-you remember my friend Chandler.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh yeah.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And that’s Phoebe over there!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God, sit down! Sit down! How long as it been since we’ve seen each other?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: 1987, the day after Christmas, at Sean McMahon’s party. I played you one of my songs, y’know Interplanetary Courtship Ritual.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh yeah. Right. So now, are—do you, do you still do music?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Sometimes, you should come over sometime! I’ll play you one of my other…

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God! Joey Tribbiani from Days of Our Lives , just walked in here!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Rach, he’s a friend of ours.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You are friends with Dr. Drake Remoray?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well it’s kinda hard to be friends with Drake because of his busy schedule and the fact that he’s not real.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey-hey, or I could bring my keyboard over here sometime!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: He’s coming over! He’s coming over!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Joey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I know, here-here!!
lines.stage_direction: holding a plate of what looks like Rice Crispies Treats Hands her the plate.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ohhh! No! This is my friend Rachel, we went to High School together.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi!
lines.stage_direction: giggles and can’t look at him

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi! I love you on that show! I watch you everyday! I mean, when you took out your own kidney to save your ex-wife even though she tired to kill you…
lines.stage_direction: still not quite able to look at him

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, it’s always nice to meet the fans.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ah!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: She’s not crazy is she?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So uh, how you doin’?

scenes.scene_description: She hangs up as Ross and Rachel enter.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hang on! Hang on! Hang on! Go!! Who’s this? Oh okay, you’re gonna like working for me. What’s your name? What kind of name is Brendy? I… Whatever… Stop talking! All right, from now on your name is Joan. You can pick your own last name.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey there you are!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Uh-oh, it’s my boss!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, here’s a list of things for you to do today. Man, this going to be so great! Thank you so much! All right, I got to go to work I’m delivering twins today, but only one of them is mine!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Drop off my dry cleaning. Pick up my vitamins. Teach me how to spell vitamins. Wear in my new jeans.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You realize what you are don’t you?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You’re his bitch.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No-no!! No!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh wait! You didn’t just sit on my Kit-Kats did you?!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No! There-there was a little, a little diff in the market and I lost 13 million dollars.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: But the Kit-Kats are all right?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What am I gonna do?! What am I gonna do?! I can’t call my office they’ll kill me! I can’t call my clients they’ll kill themselves! Great, now my chest hearts.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: My chest hurts! Oh, and now I-I can’t breathe.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Phoebe, are you having a heart attack?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, if I were, would-would I have shooting pains up and down my left arm?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yes!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Then yes that is what I’m having.
lines.stage_direction: Takes another puff of the cigarette.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God!

scenes.scene_description: Monica and Phoebe's, Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe are there. Phoebe’s cell phone rings and she goes through her little routine of lighting a cigarette before answering the phone.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Come on Pheebs, it’s not that bad! Y’know most people would be excited if they didn’t have to work for a couple of weeks.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Most people don’t like their jobs, I love my job! I have not been working for three hours and I’m already going crazy. I miss Joan.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Honey, having a heart attack is nature’s way of telling you to slow it down.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I always thought having a heart attack was nature’s way of telling you to die! But you’re not gonna die. I mean, you are going to die, but you’re not gonna die today. I wish I was dead.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Let’s take a walk. Y’know maybe you should consider writing for Talking Out of Your Ass magazine!
lines.stage_direction: They start to leave. They exit.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So what’s going on with you?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well umm, I’ve been doing a lot more of my kara-tay.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Still going through that dry spell with Carol?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: How long has it been since you had sex?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, last weekend…

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh that’s not so bad.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: …will be two months…

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That is.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: …since I stopped trying.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Maybe you need to spice things up a little.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What-what do you mean?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I don’t know. You could tie her up, she could tie you up; you could eat stuff off each other…

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Y’know, dirty talk, m�nage � trois, toys…

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Roll playing… You could be the warden; she could be the prisoner. You could be the pirate; she could be the wench!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, I think I got it.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah! Or too, you could be two stockbrokers and you’re-you’re-you’re rolling around naked on the trading floor and everybody’s watching! It never happened.

scenes.scene_description: A hospital, Phoebe is recovering from her heart attack as Ross, Monica, and Chandler are there to comfort and support her.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Sorry. So how’s it going with Joey?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh just great. He beeps me now with codes. One is, "Bring me food." Two is, "I’m with a girl, bring us food." Three is, "I’m lost and I can’t find food."

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! Is uh, is she gonna be all right?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah! She’s right in there!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh great. Hey! Go take off those pants, they look ready!
lines.stage_direction: Starts to go in. To Chandler

scenes.scene_description: A hospital hallway, Chandler is sitting on a gurney with his hands spread out behind his back. Then Monica comes and plops down on the gurney and one of his hands. Chandler immediately recoils in extreme pain.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, and over there is Brady’s Pub where I like to unwind after a long day of surgeoning.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow! This is so amazing! What else? What else?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, that is a large piece of television equipment. And uh that is an old man! Hey old man!
lines.stage_direction: Points at a large piece of television equipment as an old man walks by.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All righty, what do you say we head back to my place?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow! Umm, y’know, I-I would really love to, but I-I shouldn’t.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Why? Why can’t the world stop turning, just for a moment? Just for us?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Isn’t that a line from the show?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh, yeah but uh, I may have said those things before but, I never truly meant them. Until now.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That’s a line from the show too!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay, you watch too much TV.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Here you go Joe, here’s the freshly squeezed orange juice you asked for.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Thanks! Yeah, there’s pulp in that.
lines.stage_direction: Looks at it. Hands it back.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I thought we talked about this. I don’t like pulp. No pulp. Pulp isn’t juice. All juice, okay?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I’m sorry, I guess I just like the pulp.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh my God, I’m sorry, I’m being so rude. Rachel, would like a soda or something? Because Chandler would run right out and get it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah sure, iced tea would be great.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Iced tea.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, anything for you sir?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Did I not just tell him?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes, you did.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay look, Chandler, if this you have got to listen! You’re gonna throw that juice at me, aren’t ya?
lines.stage_direction: To Chandler Motions back and forth indicating the arrangement. Tugs on his ear. Chandler glares at him.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It’s not all juice!
lines.stage_direction: Rachel quickly gets out of the way.

scenes.scene_description: Silvercup Studios, Joey is showing Rachel around the set.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So honey, this morning was fun, huh? Me hopping in on you in the shower there.

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: Yeah! And maybe someday we could get a place with two bathrooms.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look Carol umm, I was, I was thinking maybe uh, maybe we can spice things up a little.

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Carol our sex life is—it’s just not working…

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey there little fella! Hey, uh-hey, why don’t we get some shoes on ya, huh? Hey, why don’t you show dad how you can put your shoes on, in your room! Yay!!

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: Yay!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yay! Seriously, our sex life… I was thinking, maybe I don’t know, we could try some-some new things. Y’know? For fun?

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: Like what?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well I don’t know umm, what if we were too tie each other up? Umm, some people eat stuff off one another. Nah! Umm, y’know we-we could try dirty talk? Umm, we could, we could have a threesome.
lines.stage_direction: Pause Carol’s shocked and obviously doesn’t like that idea. Carol doesn’t like that idea either. Carol still says no.

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: I love that idea!

scenes.scene_description: Ross and Carol's, Ross is trying to talk to Carol about what Phoebe told him.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Who sold a story to Archie Comics?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God! That’s great! Oh wow! You’re a published writer! I wish I had a present for you!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Aww.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wait a minute! My last Kit-Kat bar!
lines.stage_direction: Quickly checks her pockets and pulls out…

scenes.scene_description: Monica and Phoebe's, Monica is eating breakfast as Chandler enters.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You wanna share it?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! Hey Chandler look, I know you’re mad, but I just want to say I’m sorry. I-I was a total jerk. Completely o-over the line. Uh, I just I hate pulp! Y’know? I mean, y’know how Monica feels about low fat mayonnaise?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It’s not mayonnaise!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, o-o-o-o-okay anyway, I just wanted to say I’m sorry. Here.

scenes.scene_description: Chandler tries to take it, but Monica won’t let go. He tugs harder, and she still doesn’t budge.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What’s this?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Fresh squeezed orange juice, with pulp! Just the way you like it.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Aww, thanks man.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey Joey, Chandler sold a story to Archie Comics!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh my God! That’s great! Congratulations! What’s the story?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh you wouldn’t uh, care. It’s just a stupid comic book story.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Are you kidding me?! I love Archie! And the whole gang!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well uh, Archie needs money to fix his jalopy , uh but he doesn’t want Reggie to just give him the money. So Reggie hires him as his assist—as his butler. And then makes him do all these crazy things like bring him milkshakes that can’t have lumps in them.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wait a minute. That sounds a little familiar! Did they already do that one? ‘Cause I think I read it!

scenes.scene_description: Hands him a cup.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh Mon, listen I have to ask! Okay, Joey Tribbiani invited me back to his apartment, now does he do this with a lot of girls?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, a lot. A lot, a lot!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh! And I’m one of them!! Wow! Oh, I just cannot believe this! I mean, Joey Tribbiani!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, y’know it’s none of my business, but aren’t you married?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah. Oh I just wish we could not be married for a little bit! Y’know I just wish we could be like on a break!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, you’re not.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, it’s so easy for you I mean, you’re not married, you get to have sex with who ever you want!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah I can! And don’t think I don’t, because I do! I mean all the time, you betcha!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Monica. You’ve, you’ve done it right?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Of course I have! What do you think, I’m some 30 year old virgin?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God! You’re a 30 year old virgin!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Say it louder, I don’t think the guy all the way in the back heard you!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It’s not like, I haven’t any opportunities. I mean, y’know, I’m just waiting for the perfect guy. I’m seeing this guy Roger, all right? He’s not perfect, but umm, I think maybe I should just get it over with. Y’know, give him my flower.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God!! Do it!! Honey, you’ve waited long enough!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Y’know what? You are right?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes!! I mean sex does not have to be a big deal! There shouldn’t be all this rules and restrictions! Y’know, people should be able to sleep with who ever they want, whenever…

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Rachel! I’m never gonna think it’s okay for you to cheat on your husband!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh what do you know? Virgin!

scenes.scene_description: Central Perk, Monica is there as Rachel enters.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe, why is smoke coming out of the bathroom?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh yeah, the doctor said that could be one of the side effects.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe! Put that cigarette out!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No! It’s not a cigarette! The smoke is coming out of me!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Put it out!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay! Okay! I’m so glad you’re here.
lines.stage_direction: Puts it out and comes out of the bathroom.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Come on. I got it.
lines.stage_direction: Helps her into bed as her phone rings.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, give it to me.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I got it!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Give it!

scenes.scene_description: The hospital, Ross and Monica are in Phoebe’s room. Phoebe is in the bathroom and Monica notices smoke coming out from underneath the door.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hello? No she can’t come to the phone right now. Oh, right no problem. Okay, bye-bye.
lines.stage_direction: on the phone Listens. Listens. Hangs up.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Was it my work? Were they mad? Was it Jack? Did he yell?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: J-j-just relax, nobody yelled. Jack just was calling to make sure that you were getting better.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Thank God.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, she’s fired.

scenes.scene_description: He does a kara-tay move to silence her, then answers the phone.

lines.speaker: Nurse
lines.text: You’ve done all you can Dr. Wesley. You have got to let her go.

lines.text: Well, you might want to tell him it sounds like his wife is gay.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: She is not… She’s gay. Oh my God. She is so gay! I can’t believe this.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Good day for married people huh?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I’m sorry your husband cheated on you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I’m sorry your wife is gay. I guess women aren’t that great either.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Try telling my wife that.

scenes.scene_description: Central Perk, Ross is there as Rachel storms in.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay to come in?
lines.stage_direction: sticking his head in the door

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, come on, eat, whatever you want. Dr. Roger got beeped again.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah I know, guess who beeped him?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I’m the ruptured spleen.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why would you do that?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Because you shouldn’t be with him. You should be with me.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah! When you were talking about Roger, that was killing me! Look, things like last night they don’t just happen. Y’know? Or at least not to me. Or with the other two women, in the morning y’know I was just lying there and I couldn’t wait to just go hang out with my friends, but with you I always y’know with a friend.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I know you probably don’t want to go out with me, y’know because I make too many jokes and I’ve never been in a serious relationship and I guess I’m not technically a "doctor…"

scenes.scene_description: Monica and Phoebe's, Monica is blowing out a candle as Chandler enters.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: There was just one woman, wasn’t there?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, there were two.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Including me?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh yeah.

scenes.scene_description: Monica runs over and kisses him.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (singing)

scenes.scene_description: Central Perk, Phoebe is singing a new song as the gang looks on.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, remember when I had a monkey?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, what, what was I thinking?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! So, what’s with the 20 percent tip? Did I do something wrong?
lines.stage_direction: he’s just picked up their bill

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Twenty percent is a pretty generous tip Joe.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Y’know what’s more generous than that?! Fifty percent! Y’know what’s even more generous than that?!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I see where you’re goin’!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What’s up with the greed Joe?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, look I’m sorry you guys, but it’s just that I gotta get these new head shots made. And they’re really expensive, y’know? I’m down to like three! Well, actually two ‘cause one of ‘em I kinda blackened in some teeth—Why did I do that?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well isn’t there something you can do to earn a little extra money? I mean, can’t-can’t you pick up, I don’t know, an extra shift here?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Or, y’know, I used to beg for money. Of course it helps if you’ve got y’know a little of this goin’ on. Wow! I still have it!
lines.stage_direction: she sticks her chest out and shakes it

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, wait! Wait! Don’t you have an audition today? Yeah! Maybe you’ll get that job!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, ha-ha-ha! Ooh! Wait a minute, I used to get medical experiments down on me all the time!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ah, finally an explanation.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No-no! I used to get paid for all kinds of medical stuff, remember? Let’s see uh, well I don’t want to donate sperm again. I really prefer doing that at the home office y’know? Ooh-ooh, maybe they want like some of my blood or-or spit or something, huh?
lines.stage_direction: To Ross Ross nods his head.

lines.speaker: Gunther
lines.text: Joey!
lines.stage_direction: approaching with a tray with an order on it

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Gunther
lines.text: What did I tell you about talking to your friends while you’re working?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uhh do it?

lines.speaker: Gunther
lines.text: That guy has been waiting for his coffee for ten minutes! He’s complained about you three times!
lines.stage_direction: points He hands the coffee cup to Joey, assuming that Joey will deliver it and walks away.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, where was I?
lines.stage_direction: Takes a sip of the coffee.

scenes.scene_description: Central Perk, Ross, Chandler, and Phoebe are there. Joey is working.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, what have you guys been up to?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ohh! We went to a self-defense class today!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, kicking a guy in the crotch all morning really takes it out of ya!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Takes it out of you?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Now, we can kick anybody’s ass!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: After one class? I don’t think so.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What? You wanna see me self-defend myself?! Go over there and pretend you’re a sexual predator! Go on! I dare ya!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, of course you can defend yourself from an attack you know is coming, that’s not enough. Look, I studying kara-tay for a long time, and there’s a concept you should really be familiar with. It’s what the Japanese call unagi.
lines.stage_direction: he holds two fingers up to his temple, and he does this every time he says this word

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Isn’t that a kind of sushi?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, it’s a concept!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah it is! It is! It’s freshwater eel!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: All right, maybe it means that too…

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh! I would kill for a salmon skin roll right now!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y’know what? Fine! Get attacked! I don’t even care!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Come on Ross. We’re sorry. Please tell us what it is.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Unagi is a state of total awareness. Okay? Only by achieving true unagi can you be prepared for any danger that may befall you!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You mean in case someone is trying to steal your bamboo sleeping mat or your kettle of fish?

scenes.scene_description: Central Perk, Ross is there as Phoebe and Rachel enter wearing workout clothes.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: All I’m saying is, it’s one thing being prepared for an attack against like each other; whole another story being prepared for an attack, I don’t know, like a surprise !!
lines.stage_direction: moves closer turns and puts his face close to Rachel’s and screams

scenes.scene_description: Rachel laughs and Ross mocks her.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: All right, you know that one was coming, but that doesn’t mean you have unagi.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ooh! Y’know what? If we made reservations, we could have unagi in about a half-hour.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y’know what…
lines.stage_direction: Moves away as Chandler enters, panicked.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey-hey, is Monica here?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, look I need your help, I don’t know what to get her for Valentine’s Day.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, Valentine’s Day was like two weeks ago, so I wouldn’t get her a calendar!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: She was working on Valentine’s Day so we’re celebrating it tonight.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ohh, hey! Why don’t you book a date for both of you at one of those romantic spas?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ooh, Joey, that’s actually a really good idea!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: And of course, crotchless panties.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well appealing as that does sound to her boyfriend and her brother, I can’t do that we promised we’d make each other gifts this year.
lines.stage_direction: pause the camera pans to Ross flashing Joey a very evil look; Joey gets scared

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Aw, I love that.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You guys!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You can’t make crotchless panties? You take, you take a pair of scissors and you just cut…

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay-okay-okay! So, making things. That sounds like so much fun.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, I thought so to until I paper mached one of my eyes shut.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, I love paper mache! What did you make?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I made a…
lines.stage_direction: Does one of those gibberish words.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What is that?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Nothing!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So what are you gonna do?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, have you guys made anything that maybe I can take credit for?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ohh! I have! I have! I started making these little sock bunnies! Oh for crying out loud!
lines.stage_direction: She takes out a sock that’s been made into a bunny with eyes, nose, mouth, whiskers, and two other socks sown onto it for ears.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey, wait a minute! That is my sock!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Now, it’s you little bunny friend.
lines.stage_direction: She sticks it in Rachel’s face and they both laugh.

scenes.scene_description: Rachel calmly wipes the spittle off her face.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: This, this actually is a…
lines.stage_direction: admiring his work Does the same gibberish word from before.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey! Honey, can I ask you a question about the Valentine’s Day gifts?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, yeah.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Do we have to make the entire thing?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yes! Why, did you—you forget to make yours?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Of course, of course not. I just have to uh, go over to the place where I-I made it and pick-pick it up.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay. Okay, I can’t wait! This is going to be the best Valentine’s Day ever! I can’t believe it! Make the presents! Make the presents!
lines.stage_direction: They kiss. Chandler giggles and exits.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I’m just so excited to make the presents! Shoot!
lines.stage_direction: Chandler does another sarcastic/scared laugh and leaves.

scenes.scene_description: Monica and Chandler's, Chandler is desperately trying to make his Valentine’s Day gift. He takes a paper cup, turns it upside down, sticks two pencils into the top, and hangs a coat hanger from the bottom.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hi uh, I’m Joey Tribbiani and with all do respect I’d like to donate some fluids.

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.text: We’re actually at the end of one of our research cycles, so we’re not looking for applicants right now.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh that’s too bad. I’ve kinda been saving up. Uh, are you sure there’s no studies I can participate in?
lines.stage_direction: She just looks at him in horror.

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.text: Well, here’s a schedule of what’s coming up.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Thanks. Well but this one starts now.
lines.stage_direction: Starts to read it. Points to one.

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.text: Oh that one is available now, but only identical twins are eligible. It’s a twins study.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: But it’s $2,000.

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.text: Sorry.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well how about this one? Testing the effects of Joey Tribbiani on attractive nurse receptionists.

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.text: We already got the results back on that on, and they’re not good.

scenes.scene_description: A Medical Research Office, Joey is there to sign up for an experiment, any experiment.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: DANGER !!! DANGER !!!!!

scenes.scene_description: The Hallway between the Apartments, Ross is hiding behind that bump out on Monica’s side waiting for Phoebe and Rachel. As they come up the stairs, he jumps out and yells…

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ross!!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What the hell was that?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: A lesson in the importance of unagi.
lines.stage_direction: He starts doing the finger thing every time now.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ohh, you’re a freak !!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Perhaps. Now I’m curious, at what point during those girlish screams would you have begun to kick my ass?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right, so we weren’t pre pared!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I’m sorry I had to take such drastic measures to make my point, but I—look, I just want you guys to be safe. DANGER !!!!! Ahhh, huh? Unagi.
lines.stage_direction: Monica comes out to throw out the garbage and Ross screams… She completely ignores him and keeps walking.

scenes.scene_description: They both scream and jump away.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: 2,000 bucks is a lot of money. Oh, I wish I had a twin. Where could I find someone who looks exactly like me?
lines.stage_direction: in his head The camera widens its shot to reveal a room full of Joey look-a-likes. Joey looks at the guy next to him and then back at his script.

scenes.scene_description: Cole-Geddes Casting Agency, Joey is there on his audition and thinking about that 2,000 bucks for the twins study.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Chandler. I sensed it was you.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Unagi. I’m always aware.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, are you aware unagi is an eel?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What’s up?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I can’t figure out what to make Monica.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, why don’t you make her one of your little jokes.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I’m going crazy! Okay? Do you have any thing around here that looks homemade?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y’know what? She’d-she’d love this. Uh, it’s an exact replica of Apollo 8. I made it in the sixth grade.
lines.stage_direction: Picks up a model of the Saturn V rocket, that’s the one that took man to the moon.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, I guess I could use that. I could say that your love sends me to the moon.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah-yeah, except Apollo 8 didn’t actually land on the moon. But you-you-you could write that umm, your love lets me orbit the moon twice and return safely.
lines.stage_direction: Apollo 8 was the first one that orbited the moon and the one that read the Christmas Story from the orbit of the moon on Christmas Eve, 1968. They also took the famous Earthrise picture of the Earth rising over the moon.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Wait a minute, I can’t give this to her.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Because it says "Captain Ross" on the side and "I hate Monica" on the bottom.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh.

scenes.scene_description: Ross's apartment, Ross is coming in from doing his laundry. He starts folding it as Chandler enters.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: DANGER

scenes.scene_description: Chandler leaves dejectedly. When the door closes Rachel and Phoebe jump out from behind the curtains and scream…

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ahhhhh, salmon skin roll.

scenes.scene_description: Ross screams like a little girl.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay. Okay. Yes honey, I made it myself. I can’t do it. I can’t do it. Oh! Oh! A mixed tape! A mixed tape!!
lines.stage_direction: He goes to the closet, moves the clothes out of the way, and notices an empty hanger. He takes the empty hanger and bends it all out of shape. Then he holds it out as if he’s giving it to her. He throws it down and goes to her chest, grabs something, goes to the bed table, and takes out a pair of scissors. He turns around and holds the scissors to the crotch of the panties he just removed. He throws them both down and continues looking. He opens another closet door and finds a tape. He runs out into the living room.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey! Hi! You uh, ready to exchange gifts?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Sure! Okay, you go first.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, come here! Come here.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay!
lines.stage_direction: She takes her present for him and they move over to sit on the couch.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Now, it’s not wrapped because I just, just finished it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: But I made you a tape of what I think are all romantic songs.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, what a great gift! Is The Way You Look Tonight on it?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Maybe we’ll have to listen and see!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, I love it! Thank you so much!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, you ready to open yours?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay.

scenes.scene_description: Monica and Chandler’s bedroom, he’s still trying to figure out what to make Monica.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It’s a sock bunny.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah-yeah, you remember how I call you bunny?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Not really.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, I did one time, and-and I want to start doing it more. See that’s what this is about.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I see. Y’know umm, Phoebe makes sock bunnies.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No! No, she doesn’t. Uh Phoebe, what she makes—that’s uh—they’re sock rabbits. They are completely different—Okay! Okay! Okay! I didn’t make it! I’m sorry! I totally forgot about tonight and the fact that we’re supposed to make the presents!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, it’s okay. I don’t…

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No-no, it’s not okay! It’s not! I mean you were just… You’re so incredible! You went through all this time and effort to make this tape for me! Y’know I’m just gonna—I, I am gonna make this up to you! I will! I-I am going to cook anything you want in here , and I am going to do anything you want in there!
lines.stage_direction: points to the kitchen Points to the bedroom.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, I did put a lot of thought in the tape.
lines.stage_direction: thinking it over They both run into the bedroom.

scenes.scene_description: He opens his present to find Phoebe’s sock bunny from earlier.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Wow! You are way to young to have seen that!
lines.stage_direction: To the sock bunny still on his hand.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oops! Y’know, your birthday is in a month-and-a-half, what do you say I forget to get you a present for that too?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You are totally and completely 100% forgiven.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We have got to wash that!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah!
lines.stage_direction: Takes it off his hand and throws it behind the night-stand.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Do you remember that jacket that you love so much, that you thought was too expensive?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You have done enough!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I wanna wake up early and go get it for you!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No you don’t—get it in black, not brown.

scenes.scene_description: Monica and Chandler’s bedroom, they are relaxing in sexual bliss.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oop, your cake is ready!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oop!

scenes.scene_description: The oven dings.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, it’s like that old saying, have some sex, eat some cake.

scenes.scene_description: They both get out of bed and go get some cake.

lines.speaker: Joey's Look-A-Like
lines.text: Hey Mon! Hey Chann! Just gettin’ a soda!
lines.stage_direction: He goes to the fridge Does so.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Who the hell are you?!

lines.speaker: Joey's Look-A-Like
lines.text: I’m Joey! How are you doin’?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No! No! No! No! No! How you doin’?! How you doin’—Damnit Carl! Go wait in the hall!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Look, I got to apologize on the behalf of Carl.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Who the hell is Carl?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, did I not mention? Carl is a guy I hired to be my identical twin for a medical research project.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y’know sometimes the good ideas are just right in front of you, aren’t they?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay, I know it sounds crazy, but I think it might work. Y’know? The only problem is, Carl’s acting is…
lines.stage_direction: Does the international hand symbol for so-so.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: The only problem!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, he’s the reason I didn’t get that big Minute Maid commercial a couple of years ago remember? We were supposed to be brothers, but he messed it up.

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.text: Hey, uh can I get a little piece of that cake?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Pizza!! We like Pizza!! Get out!!!

scenes.scene_description: As they approach the kitchen, the door opens and in walks in a Joey look-a-like.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Pat Sajak?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yep!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Alex Trebek?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, of course!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Chuck Woolery?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Definitely! Phoebe, you will not find a single game show host, who’s ass I cannot kick.

scenes.scene_description: Phoebe and Rachel's, Phoebe and Rachel are returning.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Say it!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Say we are unagi!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It’s not something you are! It’s something you have!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Say it!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y’know what? I can easily get out of this, but there is a chance you can get very, very hurt!

scenes.scene_description: They start to walk into the living room and notice someone’s head sticking up from behind a chair. The camera cuts to the other side and we see it’s Ross.
Rachel yanks on his legs again and he groans in pain.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right Carl, we’re next. Now remember, what is not gonna be?

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.text: Another Minute Maid fiasco.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That’s right! And what are you not gonna do?

lines.speaker: Carl
lines.text: Well, I’m not gonna talk because…

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Damnit Carl!
lines.stage_direction: gets very angry Carl goes to say something more, and Joey silences him with a grunt.

lines.speaker: The Doctor
lines.text: Can I have the next one please? Joey and Tony Tribbiani.
lines.stage_direction: entering To the receptionist Takes the form. Joey and Carl stand up.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That’s us.

lines.speaker: The Doctor
lines.text: But uh, this is a study for identical twins.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That’s right, $2,000.

lines.speaker: The Doctor
lines.text: But, you’re not identical twins.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Damnit Carl!

scenes.scene_description: The Medical Research office, Joey is there with Carl in the waiting room. Two identical twins come out and both wave by at the same time.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh my good God.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey! Continuing the countdown of your favorite meals. Tonight, No. 3, macaroni and cheese with cut up hot dogs.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look, you have done enough! Okay? You have to stop this now.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I will! But not tonight. For dinner music, I thought we could listen to that tape you made me.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, the mixed tape.

scenes.scene_description: Monica and Chandler's, Monica is getting ready for Chandler’s arrival. He enters and finds the place lit with candles and dinner on the table.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: The Way You Look Tonight is on here! Dance with me?

scenes.scene_description: Monica pushes play and The Way You Look Tonight starts to play.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You are just the sweetest.

scenes.scene_description: He hesitates, then goes over to dance with her.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No! You’re the sweetest!
lines.stage_direction: He tries to kiss her but Monica backs away with a look that could kill on her face.

scenes.scene_description: Suddenly, a strange and familiar voice comes out of the tape player. Here’s a hint, OH…MY…GAWD!! That’s right, it’s Janice!

lines.speaker: The Instructor
lines.text: Okay ladies, that ends today’s class, and let’s remember, let’s be safe out there.

title: The One Where Ross Dates A Student

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey! I just got uh, my teacher evaluations! Check out what this one student wrote, "I loved Dr. Geller’s class. Mind blowing lectures! Dr. Geller, you are definitely the hottie of the paleontology department!"

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You know he coulda gotten me a VCR, he coulda gotten me a set of golf clubs, but no, he has to get me the woman repeller! The eyesore from the Liberace house of crap!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: It's not that bad.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, yeah, easy for you to say, you don't have to walk around sporting some reject from the Mr. T collection. [Joey walks in behind Chandler]

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Chandler, Chandler.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I pity the fool who puts on my jewelry, I do, I do. I pity the fool that. . . [turns around and sees Joey] Hi!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, I mean when you were late last night, Kathy and I got to talking, and one thing to another and…

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: And what?! Did you sleep with her?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No! No! No! I just kissed her.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What?!! That’s even worse!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: How is that worse?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don’t know! But it’s the same!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You’re right, I have no excuses! I was totally over the line.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Over the line?! You-you’re-you’re so far past the line, that you-you can’t even see the line! The line is a dot to you!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look, I’m not saying that you should magically forgive me! But you’re not perfect! You’ve made some errors in judgment too!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Name one!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What happened?!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Awww, man! He promised he wouldn’t take the chairs!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What the hell happened?!! How were you locked in?!! And where the hell is all of our stuff?!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, this guy came by to look at the unit and-and he said he didn’t think big enough to fit a grown man!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So--You got in voluntarily ?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I was tryin’ to make a sale!! Oh, man, if I ever run into that guy again, do you know what I’m gonna do?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: BEND OVER?!!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ok, now, remember, no trading. You get the pretty one, I get the mess.

lines.speaker: Lorraine
lines.text: Hi, Joey. Well well, look what you brought.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: ...And what did you bring?

lines.speaker: Lorraine
lines.text: She's checking the coats. Joey, I'm gonna go wash the cab smell off my hands. Will you get me a white Zinfandel, and a glass of red for Janice.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Janice?

scenes.scene_description: The phone rings and Joey answers it.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Janice?!

lines.speaker: Janice
lines.text: Oh.... my.... God.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Joey's tailor...took advantage of me.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No way! I've been going to the guy for 12 years.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh come on! He said he was going to do my inseam, and he ran his hand up my leg, and then, there was definite...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Cupping.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's how they do pants! Ross, will you tell him? Isn't that how they measure pants?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes, yes it is. In prison!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I said name one!

scenes.scene_description: Lorraine leaves. Joey shakes his head as though to say, 'It can't be the same Janice.' Janice enters.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I can’t believe I did this! What an idiot!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, stop beating yourself up! People make mistakes! These things happen! There aren’t any message you’ve forgotten to give me are there? Apparently you’re not very good at it! I…
lines.stage_direction: Chandler has a disgusted look on his face.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Do you think he’ll ever forgive me?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Of course he will! But Chandler the most important thing is you forgive yourself!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y’know what? I-I kinda have.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Already? That’s pretty bad what you did.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Y’know what? He will forgive you. And I like to bring a pad with me when I go answer the phone just in case… Okay…
lines.stage_direction: Chandler gets that disgusted look back.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You didn’t see how mad he was, y’know?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I’m sure he will forgive you. Look, we have all been there! Y’know, you fight, you make up, it’s just the way it works.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It took two people to break up this relationship!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah! You and that girl from that copy place, which yesterday you took full responsibility for!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I didn’t know what I was taking full responsibility for! Okay?! I didn’t finish the whole letter!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I fell asleep!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You fell asleep?!

lines.speaker: It was 5
lines.text: 30 in the morning, and you had rambled on for 18 pages. Front and back!! Oh-oh-oh, and by the way, Y-O-U-apostrophe-R-E means ‘you are,’ Y-O-U-R means ‘your!’
lines.stage_direction: they go into the living room, trapping Monica, Chandler, and Joey in the kitchen to Rachel

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Y'know I can’t believe I even thought about getting back together again! We are so over!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: FINE BY ME!!
lines.stage_direction: starts to cry he opens the door and traps Chandler behind it

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: And hey! Just so you know, it’s not that common! It doesn’t happen to every guy! And it is a big deal!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I KNEW IT!!!!
lines.stage_direction: coming out from behind the door

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You had no right to go out with him.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That is the most ridiculous...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You sold me out.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I did not sell you out.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yes you did. You absolutely sold me...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Would you let me talk. [flicks Monica on the forehead]

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Did you just flick me?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: OK, well, you wouldn't let me finish and I was jus- [Monica flicks her back] Ow. That hurt [flicks Monica]

scenes.scene_description: Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe's, Monica and Rachel are consoling Chandler.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh! All right. Now, let's not do this!

scenes.scene_description: They keep flicking each other. This turns into slapping each other.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Happy thoughts! Happy thoughts!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: OK, now I'm gonna kick some ass.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ow! Ow! Ow!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I know! I know! I know!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Alright, now I will let go if you both stop.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Fine!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Fine!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: There we go.You know what, if we were in prison, you guys would be, like, my bitches.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay, buddy-boy. Here it is. You hide my clothes, I'm wearing everything you own.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Look at me! I'm Chandler! Could I be wearing any more clothes? Maybe if I wasn't going commando...

scenes.scene_description: Rachel tackles Monica onto the couch.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah. Whew, it's hot with all of this stuff on. I ah, I better not do any, I don't know, lunges.

scenes.scene_description: Chandler does this throat sound.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Joey? Got you a Joey Special, two pizzas! Joe? Hello? Damnit! Hello? No, Joey’s not here right now, but I can take a message I think. He’s still got a chance for the part?! Oh, that’s great news! Well no obviously not for the actor who was mauled by his dog. Oh well, that’s great. I will give Joey the message. Thank you! Yes! Okay, Mac audition at 2:00. Allergy actor attacked. By dog not flowers.
lines.stage_direction: The phone rings and he answers it On phone Takes the phone away from his mouth when he realizes what he just did and yells. Back on phone. Listens. Listens Listens Listens Hangs up and goes to write the message on the Magna-Doodle . Reading what he’s writing Pause

scenes.scene_description: Joey and Rachel's apartment, Chandler is entering with a peace offering of a Joey Special, two pizzas.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Please tell me you got the message!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What message?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: The actor playing Mac couldn’t do it, they needed to see you at 2 o’clock.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What?! It’s 6 o’clock!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Du-du-I wrote it, I wrote it on the board! I wrote it on the board, then I went all over New York City looking for ya! I went to Ross’s! I went to the coffeehouse! I went to any place that they made sandwiches!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I can’t believe this Chandler!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Sorry! I-I-I don’t know what to say.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well you-you-you-you might say congratulations! I saw the board! I went to the audition! I got the part!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Is that supposed to be funny! I was really worried over here!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, well I’m uh…

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y’know, sometimes that fake out thing is just mean!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh wow! Okay man, I’m sorry. I did not mean to make you feel bad.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well that’s good. Because you didn’t! And I’m incredibly happy for ya!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That’s mean! You really had me going there!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, we could do this all day.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, you’re right. Okay look, listen, let’s talk about what a huge star I’m gonna be!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You are gonna be a huge star! I’m gonna hug ya!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You hug me!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, do we do this too much?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I think so. Yeah, get off me.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.

scenes.scene_description: Joey and Rachel's apartment, Joey is entering to find Chandler waiting patiently for him.
They separate.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Come on C.H.E.E.S.E., I’m not leaving without you! Try routing your backup source through your primary CPU.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I can’t! My circuits are fried! They’re fried I tell you!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wow! Well then I’ll just have to carry you.

scenes.scene_description: Joey and Rachel's apartment, Joey and Phoebe are reading a scene from Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That’ll be a neat trick, when you’re, when you’re dead!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ross, you don’t have to yell.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: There was just an explosion, okay? My hearing would be impaired.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I thought you were excellent! In fact for a minute there I was like, "Ooh, where’d Ross go?"

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Thank you! And I have to say that first scene when you meet Mac…

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh my God. I mean…

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Y’know what? I think that’s enough for today. Thanks for your help!
lines.stage_direction: He grabs their scripts and heads for his room.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: He’s holding us back.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Totally.

scenes.scene_description: Suddenly Ross jumps up from behind the counter armed with a plastic gun. By the way, he’s overacting too.

title: The One Where Ross Meets Elizabeth’s Dad

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, Chandler!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: And your horoscope says, "On the fifth a special someone is going to give you a gift."

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, well thank you in advance.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Op, but the twelfth brings a lover’s spat.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, wait and on the nineteenth a secret crush announces itself.

scenes.scene_description: Central Perk, Phoebe, Rachel, Chandler, and Monica are there. Rachel is reading everyone’s horoscope.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey guys!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God! It’s Joey Tribbiani of Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E.!!!!!!!

scenes.scene_description: Phoebe winks and licks her lips while eyeing Chandler.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh that’s right. It’s your first day! So are you psyched to fight fake crime with your robot sidekick?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Am I psyched? The lead in my own TV series? I’ve dreamed about this for years! Why have I not been preparing?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No! Joey, you’re going to be great!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: But I got to act with a robot Pheebs, and-and I don’t know anything about technology! I can’t even use Chandler’s computer except to find porn! And-and that’s only ‘cause it’s right there when you turn it on!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I think our lover’s spat will start a little early this month.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I’ll be waiting.
lines.stage_direction: in a sexy voice to Chandler

scenes.scene_description: Everyone claps and cheers, Joey mimics looking about with a gun.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Are you judging them by their covers? Because you’re really not supposed to do that.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, I’m just deciding which one to use—I’m gonna start writing another book!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Be-because the last one was such a big seller?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, if you must know I have written 14 books. And as I am the only one who has read them, I can tell you that they all have been very well received.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What are you guys doing later?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, Rachel and I have appointments to get our hair cut.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: We do?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I want to see what he wants first.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I just found out that Elizabeth’s dad wants to meet me.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Wait a minute, hold the phone! You’re not Elizabeth’s dad?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Come on guys, I-I really want this guy to like me. It-it would really help me out if you guys were here to make me look good.

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Of course we’ll help! Yeah! We’ll be here!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We know how tough those parent/teacher conferences can be.

scenes.scene_description: Central Perk, time lapse. Phoebe is now looking at the covers of two different books.

lines.speaker: The Producer
lines.text: So uh, here’s your office set!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wow! Huh? Mac Macaveli, Private Investigator!

lines.speaker: The Producer
lines.text: Let’s get you into wardrobe for a fitting.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay. Hey uh, when do I get to meet the robot?

lines.speaker: The Producer
lines.text: I’m sorry, why don’t we do that right now? He’s right here.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: The Producer
lines.text: Joey Tribbiani, this is…

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh wow! He’s so lifelike! Unbelievable! (He starts tugging on the guy’s ears.

lines.speaker: The Producer
lines.text: This is Wayne, the man who created and operates C.H.E.E.S.E.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: How do you do there, Wayne?
lines.stage_direction: slaps Wayne on his cheek Backs away.

lines.speaker: The Producer
lines.text: I’ll let you two guys get acquainted, huh?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay. Sorry about that… Uh, so where’s C.H.E.E.S.E.?
lines.stage_direction: Mimics that cheek thing he just did.

lines.speaker: Wayne
lines.text: C.H.E.E.S.E. is right here.
lines.stage_direction: He puts on his headset, picks up the controller, and wheels C.H.E.E.S.E. in. C.H.E.E.S.E. is just a plain old robot on tracks; he kinda looks like No. 5 in the movie Short Circuit .

lines.speaker: C.H.E.E.S.E.
lines.text: Nice to meet you Mac!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: This is like the temporary robot, right?

lines.speaker: Wayne
lines.text: No. Why?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, I-I just, I just it was going to be like a really cool robot, y’know? Like the terminator or uh, when I first saw you.

lines.speaker: Wayne
lines.text: I spent two years developing this machine, it’s absolutely state of the art.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I’m sorry, it just—I don’t know it doesn’t really look like it can do anything.

lines.speaker: Wayne
lines.text: It can do this.
lines.stage_direction: He moves C.H.E.E.S.E.’s arm close to Joey’s special area and he jumps back.

scenes.scene_description: Pier 59 Studios, it’s the set of Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E. The producer is showing Joey around the set.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: This is my father, Paul Stevens. Dad, this is Ross Geller.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It-it’s great to meet you Paul.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: I usually prefer Elizabeth’s boyfriends to address me as Mr. Stevens.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Of course, of course, Mr. Stevens.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: So Ross, what your problem?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Eh-wh—Excuse me?

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Why can’t you get a girlfriend your own age?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That’s funny. Umm…. It’s not funny.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: I don’t like you going out with my daughter Ross.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay. I can, I can see that. Umm, but I think if you give me umm, one chance I can, I can change your mind.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Okay. I’ll give you one chance to change my mind. You got one minute.
lines.stage_direction: Ross laughs in relief Ross suddenly gets worried.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Daddy!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Fine! Two minutes. Go.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: This is—you—

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: 1 minute 50 seconds.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, umm I want you to know that I have never done anything like this before. I mean, I mean I’ve been in um, relationships in general, uh but I have never done it with a student—I mean I not—not it ! I mean, I mean I don’t—We haven’t done it . Uh, I mean, I mean, we’ve-we’ve-we’ve done stuff. Okay, okay, a joke, a joke—lighten the mood. Umm, two guys go into a bar. One of them is Irish.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: I’m Irish.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And the Irish guy wins the joke!

scenes.scene_description: Central Perk, Ross is at the counter drinking coffee as Elizabeth enters with her dad, Paul. Elizabeth goes to kiss Ross, but he just kisses her on the forehead. By the way Paul is played by Bruce Willis. Yes, that Bruce Willis from Moonlighting , Die Hard , and Armageddon .

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ross!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ross!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How crazy that we’d run into you!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh God, thank you! Umm, uh, Mr. Stevens I’d like you to meet my friends uh, this is Phoebe, Monica, and Chandler.
lines.stage_direction: Runs and gives all of them a group hug.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You’re Elizabeth’s father, huh? I can see now where she gets her rugged handsomeness.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Is-is-is there a-a Mrs. Stevens?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: There’s a Mr. Bing!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: No, unfortunately Lizzie’s mom passed away shortly after she was born. I raised her by myself.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: I get that a lot.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay umm, why don’t we all take a seat, y’know? And uh, and I’ll get us all some uh some coffees——Yeah, why don’t you. Uh and you guys can talk about whatever, whatever you want. Y’know? Whatever pops into your head.
lines.stage_direction: He goes to pull out Elizabeth’s chair, but Paul steps in Paul pulls out her chair He turns his back to Paul and Elizabeth and points to himself for Chandler, Monica, and Phoebe. Then he goes to order the coffee.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Y’know, it is so strange seeing Ross here this time of day, ‘cause usually he’s got the children’s hospital.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah. Not looking for dates.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: So uh, Monica is Ross’s sister.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And he’s a great brother!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: I had a sister.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ohh!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: She passed away.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Oh, you don’t have to do that every time.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: But uh Ross, Ross is a great guy! I was roommates with him in college. Uh, funny story… You’re roommate in college died didn’t he?
lines.stage_direction: He starts laughing then notices that Paul isn’t happy.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: A part of him did yes.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay here we are Paul, Elizabeth. So I hope you guys were finding something to talk about.
lines.stage_direction: returning with the coffee He sets down their cups.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes, we were just…

scenes.scene_description: Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe enter.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi, I’m sorry I’m late but I am ready, ready to talk you up! When does Liz’s father get here?

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: I’m already here.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh! Ross is sooo great!

scenes.scene_description: Rachel runs in.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey honey, you got the kind with the little girl, you said we were gonna to get the kind with the baby.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, you said the baby creeps you out.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, the little girl creeps me out.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You said the baby.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Why would the baby creep me out?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why would the little girl creep you out?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You guys, I’m sorry, could you please talk a little slower?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: This is going in your book?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, it’s about relationships. Y’know? The traps, the pitfalls, what not to do, keep going. This stuff is great!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?! Excuse me!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: And how none of it matters when the people really love each other. And how people will believe anything you tell them as long as it’s a compliment.

scenes.scene_description: Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe's, Phoebe is working on her book at the kitchen table, Monica is on the couch, and Chandler is entering from the bathroom carrying a package of toilet paper.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh hi!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Hi! Hi. I think I left my keys here somewhere.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh! Well let’s look for them. Oh-oh-hey! Are these them?
lines.stage_direction: Finds some under one of the couch cushions. It has a pink, fuzzy ball on the key chain.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right!
lines.stage_direction: Throws them back under the cushion.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Oh, here they are right here.
lines.stage_direction: Picks them up from underneath the corner of the couch.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh good.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, wait! Sorry, Mr. Paul? Mr. Paul?

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Just call me Paul.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Paul. Umm, I just wanted you to know that Ross really is a great guy.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Well maybe you can date him then that would save me the trouble of killing him. Are you okay?
lines.stage_direction: Rachel laughs then starts looking at him.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You just don’t look old enough to have a twenty-year-old daughter.

lines.speaker: Paul

lines.text: I’m just me, my wife died shortly after Lizzie was born.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh. So you raised her all on your own?

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Yes I did.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh. Ooh!

lines.text: Hey!

lines.text: Hey!

lines.text: Well, why don’t you just get him fired?

lines.text: I’m the lead in Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E.!!

lines.text: Uh-oh!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh it’s important!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That’s not a bad idea. Yeah. Okay, but if I got to turn on the charm tomorrow I’m not wasting anymore of it over here with you guys. Well, actually I got a little bit saved for you Pheebs.

lines.text: Yeah, you wish.

lines.text: "You wish."

lines.text: Hmm.

lines.text: Phyllis sees what I’m doing.

lines.text: Oh-oh.

lines.text: Morning! Hey, how’s my favorite genius and my little robot buddy?!

lines.text: Don’t touch him!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay! All right. Umm, all right Wayne, level with me. Okay? I-I keep hearing all these rumors that I might get fired. Okay, they even have actors coming in to read for my part! Come on man, you-you got to give me a second chance! I mean, I love-I love this little guy! Ah-ah!! Okay, that’s why you didn’t want me to touch him right? Here you go! Okay? Stupid! I can’t believe it! God! Hey, how you doin’?
lines.stage_direction: He yanks his hand away. He grabs C.H.E.E.S.E.’s arm and pulls it off at the elbow. Wayne is shocked. Hands Wayne the arm and he goes to fix it. Meanwhile Joey starts to berate himself. A very beautiful woman walks by. To her He and her go over to talk and Wayne looks on with envy.

scenes.scene_description: Pats C.H.E.E.S.E. on the head.

lines.text: Wow! I definitely did not see that one backfiring! I’m gonna go to the bathroom.

lines.text: Yeah, take your time.

lines.text: Just-just so you know I was a freshman and she was a senior. So it wasn’t as bad as-as…

lines.text: Ross, look, I know I’ve been giving you a lot of jabs and it’s partly because I’m very protective of Lizzie, and partly because well, they just keep coming to me. But I have to admit that after all the wonderful things that Lizzie has told me and the many, many, many stories that Rachel has told me that, well you’re not all bad.

lines.text: Yeah, well my-my ex-wife and I share custody of Ben and umm, uh, and just so you know, Carol and I are on excellent terms as I’m sure you are with your wife! Oh, I’m sorry! It’s unbelievable!

The camera cuts to Wayne who’s busy making out with Sarah and rubbing C.H.E.E.S.E.’s controller on her back causing C.H.E.E.S.E. to go crazy. Joey starts throwing books at C.H.E.E.S.E. to get him to stop.

title: The One Where Paul’s The Man

lines.text: Ross.
